sessions.intent: Piece 5: Ingi-led code review and cleanup of pieces 1-4

before.assumptions: Pieces 1-4 (identity, crypto, signing, http) are complete and audited. Code was largely written by bots in the pipeline.
before.risk: Low — cleanup and polish, no new functionality.

sessions.plan: Ingi reviews the code personally and directs cleanup via coder. Architect role is minimal — branch setup and reporting only.

actions.context: Branch and report setup for piece 5

after.health: Branch created. Ingi driving review, coder executing changes.
after.notes: Scope: pieces 1-4 (identity, crypto, signing, http) plus any engine/infra changes that came with them (Settings→Config, Path→FileSystem, provider relocations).

sessions.intent: Engine folder cleanup: Errors rename, TypeMapping/Types consolidation, dead code removal

before.assumptions: Reviewed Debug, Errors, Events, FileSystem, Goals, Memory, Providers, Types, Utility folders. Found 3 issues.
before.risk: Low — rename, deduplication, dead code deletion. No behavioral changes.

sessions.plan: 1. Rename DataSourceError→SettingsError. 2. Consolidate TypeMapping/Types duplicate dictionaries. 3. Delete unused Runtime2 PrParser.

actions.context: Types delegates to TypeMapping for name↔type, keeps unique extension/kind/mime. Depth guard added to TypeMapping.GetType(). Path uses engine.Types.Mime().
Zero references, dead code, used System.IO directly

after.health: Both PLang and PLang.Tests build with 0 errors.
after.notes: TypeMapping remains static (source generator needs it). Types is the OBP-correct instance API. Both use the same data.
